tagline: Building models that catch what the eye might miss — one image at a time.
summary: Motivated Computer Science student seeking opportunities to apply hands-on experience in software development, Machine Learning, and Computer Vision. Proficient in Python, OpenCV, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn, with foundational knowledge of Deep Learning and NLP. Passionate about solving real-world problems and contributing to practical projects.
focusNote: I care about building models that are actually useful — not just accurate on paper, but genuinely helpful for early detection and better decisions in health, agriculture, and safety.

education.detail: Focus on machine learning, computer vision, and applied software development.
Foundational coursework in computer science and mathematics.

focusAreas.title: Computer Vision
focusAreas.detail: Image processing and real-time detection tasks built on OpenCV and deep learning.

focusAreas.title: Healthcare & Agricultural ML
focusAreas.detail: Disease prediction from health records and dental/leaf imagery.

focusAreas.title: Full-Stack + AI
focusAreas.detail: PHP Laravel and MySQL systems wired up to deep learning models.
